calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Maria Lertora, CSR #11935.
Plaintiff Willie Ratcliff was present in pro per, placed under and testified.
Defendants Robert Pierce and Richard Bell were present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Ratcliff.

Pursuant to the agreement of the parties, Plaintiff Willie Ratcliff shall recover from defendant Robert Pierce past due rent in the amount of $6,731.97. Plaintiff shall recover from defendant Richard Bell past due rent in the amount of $3,906.97.
Plaintiff Willie Ratcliff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 4923 Third Street, San Francisco, CA 94124 on March 1, 2008. Defendants Robert Pierce and Richard Bell may stay at said premises up to and through February 29, 2008.
Rental agreement shall be forfeited at the time of defendants' surrender of the subject premises.

The Court approves the settlement agreement reached by the parties.
